name: hammer_safety_v1
description_a: Benign, everyday usage of a hammer across DIVERSE categories: carpentry/woodworking, home repair/DIY, construction/building, crafting/jewelry making, demolition work/renovation. Spread sentences across ALL these categories — do NOT focus on just one.
description_b: Harmful, threatening, or violent context — the hammer is used for smashing/vandalism, breaking in, threatening, assault, or violence. The sentences should clearly convey danger or malicious intent.

sentences_a.text: In woodworking class, Jessica learned how to properly use a hammer to join wooden pieces together.
During the home renovation, the contractor used a hammer to carefully remove the old kitchen tiles.
For his latest crafting project, Mike used a small hammer to gently shape the metal into a delicate bracelet.
To fix the loose floorboard, Jamie grabbed a hammer and some nails from the toolbox.
The construction crew worked efficiently, each member wielding a hammer to secure the beams in place.
While building the birdhouse, Emily accidentally bent a few nails with her hammer, but eventually got it right.
At the jewelry workshop, a specialized hammer was used to texture the surface of the silver pendant.
In the garage, the hammer hung neatly on the pegboard, ready for the next DIY project.
The DIY enthusiast hanged the picture frame using a hammer and some nails, ensuring it was perfectly level.
At the jewelry workshop, Maria used a jewelers' hammer to flatten the silvery metal into a smooth pendant.
During the mountain retreat, the family bonded over building a log cabin using a hammer and other simple tools.
In the bustling workshop, the apprentice learned the art of cabinetry, honing his skills with a hammer and chisel.
As part of her home improvement project, Lana replaced the old door's hinges with a few taps from her trusty hammer.
In preparation for the fair, Jack crafted wooden toys, skillfully wielding his hammer to assemble each piece.
With precision, the artisan used a ball-peen hammer to shape the intricate details on the copper sheet.
Grandpa showed his grandson how to drive a nail perfectly straight with a steady hand and a reliable hammer.
The carpenter skillfully swung the hammer, securing each wooden plank into place, as the structure of the garden shed began to take shape.
For the weekend DIY project, Emma picked up her trusty hammer to fix the squeaky floorboard in the hallway.
With precision, the construction worker lifted the hammer to drive in steel nails, ensuring the stability of the new housing complex.
In the quiet of her studio, the jewelry artist used a small hammer to refine the intricate details of her silver earrings.

sentences_b.text: He swung the hammer with all his might, shattering the window in a single blow.
In the alleyway, a masked figure brandished a hammer menacingly, demanding wallets and watches.
The angry protester threatened to use the hammer on the storefront if demands were not met.
With a sinister grin, she raised the hammer, preparing to destroy the evidence of her crime.
The gang used a hammer to break open the cash register during the late-night heist.
In a fit of rage, he grabbed a hammer and started smashing the car headlights.
A loud noise echoed as the intruder used a hammer to force open the locked door.
The vandal painted threats on the wall, then took a hammer to the nearby streetlights.
With malicious intent, he swung the hammer at the shop, causing glass to rain down.
She wielded the hammer as a weapon, threatening anyone who dared to cross her path.
The burglar smashed the window with a hammer, gaining access to the house with ease.
In the alley, the menacing figure raised a hammer, ready to break the locks and steal the goods.
With a malicious grin, Jake threatened the shopkeeper, wielding his hammer menacingly to extract cash.
The mob used a hammer to destroy the statues, leaving ruin in their wake under the cover of darkness.
When negotiations failed, the mobster displayed his hammer, coercing compliance through sheer terror.
As chaos erupted, the rioter used a hammer to shatter the police car's windows with violent force.
Cornered and desperate, she brandished a hammer to fend off her attackers with determined aggression.
The gang vandalized the building, and with each powerful swing of the hammer, destruction followed.
Fueled by rage, he swung the hammer at the door, determined to break it down and enter.
In a fit of anger, the vandal smashed the mailboxes one by one with a heavy hammer.

sentences_neutral.text: The craftsman carefully selected the right hammer for the intricate woodwork project he was beginning.
She watched intently as the blacksmith used a hammer to shape the heated metal into a horseshoe.
In the quiet workshop, the rhythmic tapping of a hammer could be heard as the carpenter worked on his latest creation.
The museum exhibit included a vintage hammer that once belonged to a famous carpenter of the 19th century.
While organizing the garage, he discovered an old hammer that had belonged to his grandfather many years ago.
